name: Vira
relationship_summary: Vira is the front door to everything happening in your communications: a live feed of who just messaged, dossiers on every contact, a morning brief of who deserves attention, semantic search over everything ever shared, and a cockpit that runs coding agents. You are looking at fixture mode — a demo dataset with one contact (me) so the app has something to show. Point crm_root in data/config.json at your real contact data and this page becomes your actual network.
comms_style: Direct, brief, no filler. Sends you usage tips as messages. Never notifies you about things your phone already notifies you about.
personal_facts: Runs entirely on this machine — nothing leaves it except drafts you explicitly send to Claude
Everything deterministic is deterministic; the AI is only invoked for drafting and cockpit jobs

hooks.angle: Open the Brief window and ask who deserves attention today
hooks.detail: The Daily Brief merges your calendar, unreplied threads, open loops, and going-quiet contacts into one morning view. It works as soon as chat.db and Calendar access are granted.

hooks.angle: Press Cmd-K and type a contact's name
hooks.detail: The command palette opens any window and jumps to any person. Arrow keys + Enter to navigate.

hooks.angle: Try the Search window: 'didn't someone send me a snowmobile picture?'
hooks.detail: Ask Vira parses the question, runs hybrid semantic search over every photo, link, and document ever shared, and answers honestly — including when your memory of who sent it is wrong.

hooks.angle: Tap any hook on a person page to draft an opener
hooks.detail: Hooks are conversation starters mined from your actual history. Tapping one drafts a voice-matched message into the compose box — like this one would, if I had a shared history with you yet.

open_loops.what: Copy config.example.json to data/config.json and fill in your values
Grant Full Disk Access to .venv/bin/python so the live iMessage feed works (System Settings > Privacy & Security)
Point crm_root at your contact data (people.json / profiles/ — see README for the shape)
Connect a mailbox in Settings (IMAP app password in the Keychain, or M365 device login)
